text.title: Success Metrics Definition Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying Success Metrics Definition. Each step lists input, action, and output. Pause and surface the artefact when output is produced.

step.name: name-north-star
step.action: Pick ONE metric whose movement defines winning.

step.name: partition-aarrr
step.action: Pick ≤1 KPI per AARRR stage that supports the north-star.

step.name: set-baselines-and-targets
step.action: Lock baseline + target + window per KPI.

step.name: flag-vanity
step.action: List vanity metrics with one-line exclusion rationale.

decision-gate.p: After the final step, the artefact MUST satisfy the output contract in content/02-output-contract.xml before downstream consumers read it.
